payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular black picture frame with a white mat and a light-toned sketch or print inside, hung on a wall and partially occluded by a diagonal wooden handrail and white balusters in the foreground; frame is slightly edge-cropped in the image and appears to be at an estimated distance of ~2.5 m from the camera.
